---
spec: pose-knowledge-consumption-traceability
category: added
breaking: false
refs:
---

Governed knowledge now shows when it influences work: specs cite artifacts
with stable `knowledge:<slug>` refs (dangling refs fail `knowledge-check`),
`pose knowledge-usage` projects citations without ever extending TTL, and
`pose knowledge-suggest` offers deterministic, explainable, advisory
retrieval that filters restricted content before ranking and always requires
human confirmation.
